tender.description: Installation and dismantling with loading, transportation and laying of 4 inch dia. heavy duty GI/MS pipe for filtered water supply to Continuous miner equipments at CM-1, CM-2 and CM-3 panel at R-6 Mines, NCPH Colliery, NCPH SA (2nd Call)
